name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
description: Full-width banner: a Brand Blue centered headline (Nunito Sans 800, ~28px, top third) and a single Deep Blue button (white 800 18px label with Gold #FFC20E arrow, 248×64px, signature asymmetric radius) overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient PNG background with Sunshine #faa31b fallback.
notes: Button radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px is the mandatory signature shape on every instance. Background may be skipped only in very rare cases; when skipped, remove only background-url/size/repeat/position and keep background-color, headline color, button color, and radius exactly.
